pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
Replace separate source and target compiler settings with the unified release flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: While source/target works, the release flag is the standard for Java 9+ to ensure module path and API compatibility; strictly speaking, the old way compiles, but this is a structural migration pattern often enforced by recipes.
